item.title: A Sheriff’s Case That Lasted Nearly Two Decades
item.description: A long-running case that stayed with a sheriff for nearly two decades, highlighting the persistence of the investigation and the unanswered questions.

media:content.media:title: A Sheriff’s Case That Lasted Nearly Two Decades
media:content.media:description: A long-running case that stayed with a sheriff for nearly two decades, highlighting the persistence of the investigation and the unanswered questions.

item.title: LEGO Bricks Help Solve Lucille's Case
item.description: LEGO bricks played a key role in solving Lucille's case 23 years later.

media:content.media:description: LEGO bricks played a key role in solving Lucille's case 23 years later.

item.title: A Hidden Truth Emerges After His Death
